nasb.text: For I have heard the slander of many, Terror is on every side; While they took counsel together against me, They schemed to take away my life.

esv.text: For I hear the whispering of many— terror on every side!— as they scheme together against me, as they plot to take my life.

cnv.text: 我聽見許多人的毀謗， 四周都有驚嚇； 他們一同商議攻擊我， 圖謀要取我的性命。

ccb.text: 我听见许多人毁谤我， 惊恐笼罩着我。 他们图谋不轨， 谋害我的性命。

csbs.text: 我听见许多的谣言，四围都是恐吓； 他们一同商定对付我，决意取走我的性命。
